text:
Illardia (イラルディア, Irarudia) is one of Prince Fugetsu's maids during her voyage in the Black Whale to the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 369 

Appearance

Illardia has ear-length, fair hair parted in the middle. She dresses in a standard maid's robe. 

Personality

Not much is known about Illardia's personality, though she acts quite shocked that she and Ladiolus were sent to learn Nen rather than Fugetsu's personal bodyguards. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Prince Fugetsu sends Ladiolus and Illardia to attend Kurapika's two-week teaching of Nen. The two maids are bewildered why they've been chosen to learn Nen over the Royal Bodyguards and while waiting they talk with Prince Kacho's maids Loberry and Yuri. During the introductions Loberry causes a scene about a masked woman in the crowd catching everyone's attention. Sequentially after the outburst, Barrigen is killed by a small pack of snakes. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 370 Following the murder, Kurapika tells his students to decide whether to stay or leave. They all remain and he teaches them his first exercise. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 371 She along with Yuhirai and Shedule practice the prayers type of Nen training with Furykov observing them. After the first day of Kurapika's Nen training, Illardia talks with Ladiolus. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 372 The following day she attends the next Nen training session, when Myuhan is murdered by the Silent Majority. She does not intervene when Maor and Satobi accuse Kurapika of being behind the attacks after Myuhan's death. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 376 

On the 7 th day of the voyage, Illardia is still taking part in Kurapika's Nen training. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 382 Like everyone else, she begins to have doubts about the training, since they always repeat the same exercise. The following day, she observes Kurapika's Water Divination. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 386 While Ladiolus is in the main bedroom to supposedly perform Water Divination herself, Illardia chats with Yuri. The two approach her when she comes out to learn more about the screening, but Ladiolus cannot reply due to a gag order placed by Kurapika. Illardia waits in the hall until the end of the session. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 388 

On the tenth day, Illardia turns up at Room 1014 for Kurapika's Nen lesson. Kurapika and Bill invite Longhi into Room 1014's master bedroom to have her Nen divined, but takes an unnaturally long amount of time, prompting Sakata to knock and ask if anything is wrong. Kurapika steps out and says that negotiations are taking a while because they and Longhi are unable to agree on the terms of the truce, but promises to clear up any doubts the participants have later. Kurapika steps back in, and a while later returns to Room 1014's living room together with Longhi. Kurapika apologizes and explains that they are still unable to agree on the details, and invites Tenftory in to have his Nen divined. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 401 Later, Tenftory reports to Prince Zhang Lei that all of the students who have taken Kurapika's Nen training, are able to utilize Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Illardia had her Aura Nodes fully opened by Kurapika's Stealth Dolphin. She should currently be in the process of learning Ten to contain the leaking aura. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 388 

Former Nen Abilities

Manga Appearances

Trivia

For the purposes of Kurapika's Nen training, Illardia is a "prayer".
